## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Change

Describe the API, behavior, or workflow you want.

## Why This Fits Kairos

Explain why this belongs in Kairos instead of application code.

## Scope

Describe the smallest useful slice of the change.

## Notes

Add references, examples, or related issues here.
